what_was_done: Implemented 4 covenant opcodes (CLTV, CHECKSIGFROMSTACKVERIFY, OUTPUTAMOUNT, OUTPUTSCRIPT) in script engine. Added activation height guard (block 500000). Built createcovenantaddress RPC. BridgeController.sol with 26/26 tests. Wrote covenant unit tests. Planned withdrawal pipeline (9 tasks).

Qt GUI not build-tested (only daemon build verified)
Torus-core has no regtest mode (only mainnet/testnet)
Test binary (test_torus) has no Makefile target — tests written but not compiled
next_steps: Implement withdrawal pipeline (9 tasks) — see docs/plans/withdrawal-pipeline-impl.md
